content.en:
"True mountain collar, innocent gold mountain!"

Ye Tian learned the information from a beginner great ancestor.

There is an Innocent Gold Mountain in a forbidden place in the True Mountain Territory, and if you practice in that Pure Gold Mountain, you will be able to comprehend the Immeasurable Path very quickly, and even be of great use to the Perfection Level.

It's just that that forbidden land is very dangerous, even if a beginner great ancestor enters, it is dangerous.

As for the Innocent Gold Mountain, it will only appear once in a long time.

Strictly speaking, the Innocent Gold Mountain does not belong to the True Mountain Territory, but to the intersection of the True Mountain Territory and a mysterious place, but the place of intersection is exactly in the Innocent Gold Mountain.

As for where that place is, no one knows.

Even if you want to forcibly stay in the Innocent Gold Mountain, if you don't leave when the deadline is reached, you will be forcibly moved out.

This special rule made it impossible for the Great Ancestors to practice in the Pure Gold Mountain all the time.

However, whenever the Innocent Gold Mountain appears, there are still many great ancestors in the past, after all, it is also a good opportunity to be able to comprehend for a while longer!

According to the law, the Innocent Gold Mountain will probably appear in the first year of the Three Thousand Realms.

The Innocent Gold Mountain is a good chance treasure land, so the Great Ancestors of other territories also want to enter the Pure Gold Mountain, but the Great Ancestors of the True Mountain Territory are also very united.

Therefore, the Great Ancestors of other territories could not enter at all, and if they dared to force their way here, they would all be repulsed.

In addition, the time spent cultivating in the Innocent Golden Mountain was not long enough, so the other Great Ancestors were not willing to take the risk of offending the Great Ancestors of the True Mountain Territory.

Therefore, only the Great Ancestors of the True Mountain Territory were eligible to enter the Innocent Gold Mountain.

"The first year of the Three Thousand Realms is not too long!"

Ye Tian quietly waited for the first year of the Three Thousand Realms to pass.

And during this time, he didn't waste it, he was also practicing, improving his cultivation, although he couldn't improve much, but how much he could improve.

In the blink of an eye, the first year of the Three Thousand Realms passed.

this day.

A venerable ancestor set off and headed for the Innocent Gold Mountain.

The forbidden place where the Innocent Gold Mountain is located is called the Water Trace Forbidden Land, and this forbidden place is very dangerous, so those weaker ancestors are all cooperating to go together, otherwise if they go alone, they will encounter a crisis and die.

The so-called crisis is the birth of some natural killing arrays and some special strange forces in the forbidden land itself, which can threaten the primary-level immeasurable life forms.

However, Ye Tian went alone, after all, with his strength, he was naturally not afraid of the danger of the Water Mark Forbidden Land.

......

Ye Tian entered the forbidden land of water marks, as if an ordinary person had fallen into the water and walked with difficulty, and his movement was hindered.

However, for Ye Tian, this is naturally nothing, but his speed and actions have been affected a little, but for ordinary Great Ancestors, it is very uncomfortable.

Abrupt.

A trace of water crossed over in an instant, and this water mark seemed to be able to cut everything, even the body of the Great Ancestor.

However, this water mark cut Ye Tian's flesh, but he didn't even cut the skin.

This was Ye Tian who had urged the Infinite Body, so this water mark couldn't help him.

Of course, he could have dodged if he did, but there was no need for that.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to cross half of the Water Marks Forbidden Land and come to a place.

Here, an illusory mountain of gold appears.

This is the Innocent Gold Mountain!

Airplanes!

Ye Tian passed through the barrier of time and space and entered the interior of this golden mountain.

At this time, the other Great Ancestors also arrived one by one.

Subsequently, all the great ancestors practiced and comprehended the immeasurable path here, without interfering with each other.

The Innocent Gold Mountain was not large, and the area was quickly divided by these great ancestors.

And in the entire Innocent Gold Mountain, there are only these great ancestors, but the creatures of the heaven and earth where the Innocent Gold Mountain is located did not appear here, and even whether there are any creatures in the area over there is also an unknown.

However, these Great Ancestors didn't care about these issues, they just wanted to comprehend the Immeasurable Path here, and strive to raise the Immeasurable Path to the extreme realm.

At this time.

Ye Tian was also concentrating on comprehending the Immeasurable Path.

"The effect of the Innocent Gold Mountain is too good!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

He could now clearly sense that his Immeasurable Dao was progressing rapidly, and at this rate, he even had the hope of raising the Immeasurable Dao to the extreme realm in a short period of time.

Of course, the reason why he has such a terrifying speed of comprehension is because he has copied a lot of immeasurable ancestral endowments and a large number of Yuan Dao ancestral endowments, so his own potential talent is too high, and his comprehension is also as high as terrifying.

Therefore, it was naturally very easy for him to comprehend the immeasurable path, and the efficiency of his comprehension was also incomparable to that of other great ancestors.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's immeasurable path made rapid progress, getting closer and closer to the extreme realm.

However, on this day, Ye Tian and the other Great Ancestors were directly expelled from the Innocent Golden Mountain.

"It's a pity, if I practice for a while, I should be able to raise the Infinite Dao to the extreme realm, and now I am still a little short of the extreme realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he didn't think too much about it, even if he didn't have the Innocent Gold Mountain, he could still raise the Infinite Dao to the extreme realm by cultivating for a while longer.

......

Primordial Ancient Sea.

At this time, some years had passed since the end of the intersection period, and the supreme enhancement level of one tribe after another was also attacking the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms with all their might.

this day.

The Fog Crow of the Taiwu tribe is impacting the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, and it is about to break through successfully.

At this time, countless primordial antiquities have gathered here, just to protect the fog.

Abrupt!

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura came from the Taiwu tribe, and even made those Taiwu tribes feel the suffocating power up to the reinforcement level.

"Fog broke through the !!"

Several supreme enhancement level were shocked, and they were immediately overjoyed.

This is the first mid-level immeasurable lifeform in the Primordial Ancient Sea!

With the breakthrough of the Fog Crow, the Taiwu tribe is about to become the strongest tribe of the Primordial Ancient Sea, and completely crush those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea.

The time has come for the Taiwu tribe!

Soon, the fog was out of the customs.

"Wuwu, have you broken through?"

A reinforced-level asked.

"I've broken through, although I haven't completely stabilized the realm, but I'm indeed already a mid-level immeasurable lifeform!" Wu Wu said excitedly.

"Wuwu, why did you get out of the realm without stabilizing the realm?" asked another Ascendant-level.

"The realm is unstable, the Silent Black Sea and those supreme powerhouses who have cut off the forbidden area may give birth to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform at any time, so I must take the opportunity to lead the supreme reinforcement of the entire Primordial Ancient Sea to invade the Silent Black Sea and completely defeat those forces of the Silent Black Sea!"

Wuwu said.

"Yes!"

Several of the Fortifiers approved of the plan.

Subsequently, they began to inform the other tribes of the Supreme Enhancement Level, and immediately came to the Taiwu tribe to discuss the plan.
